name: ChatGPT
desc: The gold standard for AI conversation, coding, and problem-solving.
longDesc: ChatGPT remains the most used AI tool worldwide. For professionals in the US and UK, it is the primary assistant for drafting emails, debugging complex code, and brainstorming business strategies.

name: Jasper AI
desc: The best AI writer for professional marketing and brand consistency.
longDesc: Jasper is the top choice for digital agencies in the US. It specializes in creating high-converting marketing copy while maintaining a consistent brand voice for SEO blog posts.

name: Midjourney
desc: Leading AI for ultra-realistic image generation and digital art.
longDesc: When it comes to high-end visual content, Midjourney is the undisputed leader. It is widely used by designers in London and New York to create photorealistic textures and concepts.

name: ElevenLabs
desc: Industry-leading AI for realistic voice synthesis and cloning.
longDesc: ElevenLabs provides the most human-like AI voices in the world. It is the go-to tool for YouTubers and podcasters in the UK who need professional narration and emotional depth.

name: Perplexity AI
desc: The future of search engines: AI that cites real-time sources.
longDesc: Perplexity is rapidly replacing traditional search for researchers in the US. It provides direct answers with citations, making it the most trusted tool for fact-checking.

name: Canva Magic Studio
desc: All-in-one AI design suite for presentations, social media, and video.
longDesc: Canva's Magic Studio brings AI-powered design to everyone. It allows professionals to generate layouts, remove backgrounds, and edit videos instantly, making it a staple for US small businesses.
